description: Amp up your style quotient with these leather slip-ons from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and absolutely comfortable for the feet, they're a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team them with chinos and a simple shirt for that cool, casual look.UpperLeather upper for that stylish look and comfort feelCentral lace up system for a snug and customised FitRugged stitch detailing for style and durabilityMidsoleComplete inner fabric lining for breathable comfortFabric foot-bed for all day comfortBrand badge on the foot-bedOutsoleTPR outsole with patterned lugs and grooves for maximum grip, traction and easy movement of the footOutsole stitched onto the uppershoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
